channel.title: +MT on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Hybrid godesses
item.description: As an aside I was looking up the Tibetan book of dead, ~1300s; 1 encounter numerous avi-/thero-cephalic iconographies of H goddesses absorbed by the vajrayAna from shaiva tradition. There we have: the wolf-headed bluish-green vAyudevI brown ibex-headed agnAyI sow-headed vArAhI the brownish crow-headed chAmunNDI darkgreen elephant-headed bhUjanA snake-headed blue-green varuNAnI Some of iconographies are not TMK seen in a surviving H text but could have once been there.
